function.name: schedule_next_session
function.description: Schedule the next session of the three-session study. Use at the end of the current session to schedule the participant NEXT session. Works for any delay (a minute, three days, two weeks). Do NOT use schedule_callback for next-session scheduling. CRITICAL: Only invoke this tool once you have heard a CONCRETE time from the participant (examples of concrete times: 'in three days', 'next Tuesday at 2pm', 'tomorrow morning', 'in one minute'). If the participant declines your proposed time but has not yet stated a specific alternative, ASK them 'What time would work better?' and WAIT for their concrete answer before invoking this tool. Never invoke this tool with a question, open-ended phrase, or vague phrase like 'another time' as the suggestedTime argument.

suggestedTime.description: Concrete natural-language time from the participant. Must be a specific time, not a question or vague placeholder.

messages.content: Got it. I'll call you {{suggestedTime}} for our next conversation. Take care until then.
